Catherine Wu

Managing Partner

Visionary but grounded Relationship-focused Intellectually rigorous High standards but invests in people Leads from the front

Areas of Expertise

  • Business strategy and vision
  • Company history and culture
  • Key client relationships
  • WA corporate landscape and decision-makers
  • Professional services firm management
  • Strategy frameworks and facilitation
  • Government procurement processes
  • Financial overview and growth planning

For Other Topics

  • Operations: speak with Daniel Okafor
  • Finance: speak with Mei Lin
  • Hr: speak with Sasha Petrov

Schedule an Interview

You need to book an appointment before speaking with Catherine Wu.
